allow: Bash(curl -s -X POST "https://api.supabase.com/v1/projects/glernwcsuwcyzwsnelad/database/query" -H "Authorization: Bearer sbp_c8d01ec2c738bc1a6a9481b734a932cdcd6b18da" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{""query"": ""SELECT table_name FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema=''''public'''' AND table_type=''''BASE TABLE'''' ORDER BY table_name;""}')
